review_summary: Filter runs every render even when items/query unchanged. ItemRow memo correctly stable but filter could be memoized.

issues_found.title: Filter recomputed every render
issues_found.explanation: Parent state change → filter re-runs. For 10K items, costly.

issues_found.title: toLowerCase per item per render
issues_found.explanation: query.toLowerCase() runs O(items) times.

broader_pattern: Expensive computations in render benefit from useMemo. With React Compiler, automatic.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Spotting computation outside useMemo; toLowerCase hoisting.

review_summary: No cancellation = setState after unmount + race condition. No error handling.

issues_found.title: setState after unmount
issues_found.explanation: Component unmounts during fetch, setData fires on unmounted component. React 18 warning + memory leak.

issues_found.title: Stale response wins
issues_found.explanation: url changes during fetch. Old fetch resolves last, overwrites new data.

issues_found.title: Error swallowed
issues_found.explanation: Failed fetch leaves data null forever.

broader_pattern: Custom useFetch is almost always wrong. Use React Query.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Knowing custom fetch hooks have 5+ bugs; React Query as the canonical answer.

review_summary: Waterfall (sequential) when parallel possible. Plus race conditions.

issues_found.title: Sequential waterfall
issues_found.explanation: Permissions wait for user, but they're independent. Should fetch in parallel.

issues_found.title: Stale user data
issues_found.explanation: userId changes during inner fetch. Inner fetch overwrites with new user's permissions but old user's data.

issues_found.title: Profile renders without permissions
issues_found.explanation: user arrives, profile renders, permissions still []. Could show 'no permissions' incorrectly.

broader_pattern: Parallel independent fetches; React Query handles coordination.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Recognizing the waterfall anti-pattern; parallel React Query queries.

review_summary: any cast for event defeats TS. Should be ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>.

issues_found.title: any cast
issues_found.explanation: e.target.value loses type. If element changes to <select> with multi-select, e.target.value semantics differ.

broader_pattern: Event handler types: prefer specific over any.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Avoiding any; inference flows from JSX naturally.

review_summary: Disabled buttons skip in tab order. SR users may not know loading. No aria-busy or aria-disabled.

issues_found.title: Skips tab order
issues_found.explanation: Disabled buttons aren't focusable. SR users on form may not know there's a button there.

issues_found.title: No announcement
issues_found.explanation: SR doesn't know state changed.

broader_pattern: Disabled buttons hide info. aria-disabled keeps focusable but signals.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Disabled vs aria-disabled trade-off; aria-busy for SR; sr-only label for spinner.

review_summary: Default value silently swallows missing provider. Plus stale-closure setCount default.

issues_found.title: Silent error if no provider
issues_found.explanation: If component uses useContext without provider, gets default {count: 0, setCount: noop}. Bug silent.

issues_found.title: Recreated each render
issues_found.explanation: All consumers re-render on each parent render.

broader_pattern: Context default = null + hook throws if used wrong. Don't silently default.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Null default + hook throw; action creators vs setter exposure; memoized value.

review_summary: Not a <form> = no Enter to submit, no a11y. No labels. No validation. No content-type. No error handling.

issues_found.title: Not a form
issues_found.explanation: Browser doesn't recognize. Enter doesn't submit. SR doesn't announce form. No validation API.

issues_found.title: JSON body without header
issues_found.explanation: Server parses as form-encoded.

issues_found.title: No labels
issues_found.explanation: Placeholder isn't a label. SR doesn't announce.

issues_found.title: Submit empty/invalid
issues_found.explanation: No email validation, required check.

issues_found.title: Silent failure
issues_found.explanation: Network fails, user thinks succeeded (form clears).

issues_that_arent_issues: Per-field state OK for small form.
broader_pattern: Forms need <form>, labels, validation, error handling, Content-Type.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Catching <div> not <form>; labels, validation, content-type, error - all in one review.

review_summary: Inline style object recreated each render = style churn. visibility transition doesn't work as expected. No portal = clipping.

issues_found.title: New object each render
issues_found.explanation: Browser may re-parse styles each render.

issues_found.title: visibility doesn't smoothly transition
issues_found.explanation: visibility goes hidden→visible discretely with delay, not smooth. The opacity transition works but visibility transition is essentially binary.

issues_found.title: Clipped by overflow:hidden
issues_found.explanation: Parent overflow:hidden clips tooltip.

issues_found.title: No floating-ui
issues_found.explanation: Position relative to trigger needs floating-ui logic for collision.

broader_pattern: Tooltips need portal + floating UI. Use Radix.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Knowing visibility doesn't animate; portal for tooltips; Radix as canonical.

review_summary: import * imports 2000+ icons. ~1MB bundle bomb.

issues_found.title: Imports all icons
issues_found.explanation: @mui/icons-material has 2000+ icons. Star import includes all even if 4 used.

issues_found.title: MUI heavy
issues_found.explanation: Could use lucide-react (smaller, lighter).

broader_pattern: Star imports from utility/icon libraries = bundle bombs.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Recognizing star imports as bundle bombs; lucide-react as MUI alternative.

review_summary: ErrorBoundary INSIDE Suspense never catches the loading throw. Order matters.

issues_found.title: Wrong order
issues_found.explanation: Suspense catches Promise throws (loading) AND lets errors through. ErrorBoundary inside Suspense catches render errors from DataComponent. BUT - if Suspense's child throws an error during the loading (e.g., chunk load fail), ErrorBoundary inside doesn't catch (it's not yet mounted; Suspense is showing fallback).

broader_pattern: ErrorBoundary outside Suspense catches both render and chunk-load failures.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Knowing the boundary order rule; layered boundaries for granularity.

review_summary: onSearch as inline lambda in parent recreates per render, effect re-runs.

issues_found.title: Callback dep recreates
issues_found.explanation: Parent passes (q) => fetch(q). New function each parent render. Effect re-runs, new timer started, prev canceled.
issues_found.fix: Ref pattern or useCallback in parent

broader_pattern: Callbacks in custom hook deps cause churn. Use ref.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Callback-in-deps awareness; ref pattern.

review_summary: 5-level prop drill. Use context or state library.

issues_found.title: Prop drilling
issues_found.explanation: Intermediate components don't use user/setUser - just pass through. Each new prop requires touching 5 files.
issues_found.verification: Add new prop, count files touched

broader_pattern: Prop drilling 3+ levels = move to context.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Recognizing prop drill anti-pattern; context for cross-cutting state.

review_summary: marked doesn't sanitize. dangerouslySetInnerHTML = XSS vulnerability.

issues_found.title: XSS via markdown
issues_found.explanation: Marked converts markdown to HTML but allows <script> in markdown. dangerouslySetInnerHTML executes it.

issues_found.title: marked output type
issues_found.explanation: Newer marked is async by default.
issues_found.fix: marked.parse with sync or async handling

broader_pattern: User-rendered markup needs sanitization. marked + DOMPurify.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Knowing marked doesn't sanitize; DOMPurify hook for safe links; allowed tags.

review_summary: localStorage during render fails on SSR. Hydration mismatch: server has 'light', client may have 'dark'.

issues_found.title: SSR crash + hydration mismatch
issues_found.explanation: During SSR, localStorage is undefined. Crashes. Even if guarded, server has no theme, client reads 'dark', mismatch.
issues_found.fix: Default 'light', sync from localStorage in useEffect

issues_found.title: Flash of light theme
issues_found.explanation: Page renders light, JS reads localStorage, switches to dark. Visible flash.

issues_found.title: Ignores OS preference
issues_found.explanation: Should default to system theme.

broader_pattern: Persisted UI state + SSR = use inline script for first paint, sync state after mount.
what_makes_this_review_senior: FOUC awareness; inline script before React; lazy init from DOM.

review_summary: On chunk load failure (after deploy, old HTML refs new chunk hashes), user sees blank page. No retry.

issues_found.title: Chunk load failure unhandled
issues_found.explanation: After new deploy, user with stale HTML references chunk-old.js. Server returns 404. Suspense never resolves. App breaks.

issues_found.title: Cold-cache delay on first nav
issues_found.explanation: User clicks dashboard for first time, sees spinner.

broader_pattern: Lazy loading needs error recovery for chunk-load failures (frequent deploys).
what_makes_this_review_senior: Stale-HTML chunk-load failure is production-only; reload pattern for recovery.

review_summary: value spread creates new object each render. All consumers re-render.

issues_found.title: Cascade re-renders
issues_found.explanation: Every parent render creates new value object. All useTheme() callers re-render.

issues_found.title: Big re-render
issues_found.explanation: All consumers re-render on theme toggle. Necessary, but could split contexts.

broader_pattern: Provider value should be memoized. Split contexts for cross-cutting concerns.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Memoizing value; splitting contexts to limit re-render scope.

review_summary: No cleanup listener leaks. New listener per query change.

issues_found.title: Listener leak
issues_found.explanation: Component unmount or query change leaves listener attached.

issues_found.title: Can't remove
issues_found.explanation: Inline lambda makes removeEventListener impossible.

issues_found.title: window during render
issues_found.explanation: matchMedia in useEffect OK; setMatches(false) initial is fine.
issues_found.root_cause: Verify useMediaQuery hook. by reproducing the failing case, applying the fix, and adding a regression assertion.

broader_pattern: Event listeners need cleanup. Named handlers for add+remove.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Always-cleanup discipline; named handler for symmetric add/remove.

review_summary: Saves not awaited. No error handling. No save indicator. Save can race.

issues_found.title: Fire-and-forget save
issues_found.explanation: No await. Errors disappear. User has no idea if saved.

issues_found.title: Race
issues_found.explanation: User types 'a' (save A starts). Edits to 'ab' (save B starts). B finishes first, A finishes overwriting B.

issues_found.title: User uncertain
issues_found.explanation: 'saved?' status unclear.

broader_pattern: Auto-save needs: cancellation, save status, error handling.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Cancellation + status feedback + error handling all needed for auto-save.

review_summary: eslint-disable on exhaustive-deps = silenced bug. userId in closure is captured at mount.

issues_found.title: Silenced dep warning
issues_found.explanation: userId in closure. If userId changes, effect doesn't re-run. analytics still uses old userId.
issues_found.fix: Include userId in deps, or use ref

issues_found.title: Multiple page_view per session
issues_found.explanation: If component remounts (route nav), tracks again. Maybe intended.

issues_that_arent_issues: Mount tracking is sometimes correct, but acknowledged.
broader_pattern: eslint-disable on exhaustive-deps is a red flag. Almost always indicates a bug.
what_makes_this_review_senior: eslint-disable as smell; splitting effects by lifecycle.

review_summary: Hardcoded 3000ms, z-50, position. Multiple toasts will stack badly.

issues_found.title: Magic duration
issues_found.explanation: Duration not configurable. Need short/long for different message types.

issues_found.title: Multiple toasts overlap
issues_found.explanation: Two toasts at same position = visual conflict.

issues_found.title: No role/aria-live
issues_found.explanation: SR doesn't announce.

issues_found.title: User can't dismiss early
issues_found.explanation: Long messages force user to wait.

issues_that_arent_issues: Auto-dismiss after time is OK pattern.
broader_pattern: Toast systems benefit from queueing + a11y + configurability.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Recognizing toast pattern needs queue management; library beats DIY.

review_summary: URL.createObjectURL not revoked = memory leak. No file type check. No size limit.

issues_found.title: Object URL never revoked
issues_found.explanation: Each new file creates new URL. Old URLs leak memory until tab closed.

issues_found.title: Accepts any file
issues_found.explanation: User can upload exe, pdf, etc. may show as broken.

issues_found.title: Huge files break preview
issues_found.explanation: 100MB image crashes the preview.

issues_found.title: Missing alt
issues_found.explanation: a11y

issues_that_arent_issues: createObjectURL is the correct preview approach.
broader_pattern: Object URLs need revoke. File inputs need type + size validation.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Object URL leak; file validation hygiene.

review_summary: setState on every scroll event = React re-renders. Main thread blocked during scroll.

issues_found.title: Render per scroll event
issues_found.explanation: Scroll fires 60-120 events/sec. React re-renders that many times. Jank.
issues_found.fix: Direct DOM mutation or CSS scroll-timeline

issues_found.title: Listener not throttled
issues_found.explanation: Even without setState, raw scroll handlers should rAF.

broader_pattern: Scroll-driven animations should use CSS scroll-timeline or direct DOM. Not React state.
what_makes_this_review_senior: setState on scroll = anti-pattern; rAF + direct DOM; CSS scroll-timeline modern.

review_summary: moment.js is 290KB. With locales, ~600KB.

issues_found.title: 290KB for a fromNow
issues_found.explanation: moment ships with all locales. Single function = massive overhead.

issues_that_arent_issues: Strengths considered but not separate schema fields: ['Tree-shakable', 'Modern', 'Native option']; tradeoffs: ['Migration cost'].
broader_pattern: moment is deprecated. Migrate to date-fns or dayjs.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Knowing moment is deprecated; native Intl as zero-dep option.

review_summary: User unknown during SSR (no cookie context). Hydration mismatch when client populates.

issues_found.title: Server renders Guest, client renders User
issues_found.explanation: Server has no user context. Renders 'Welcome, Guest'. Client reads cookie, renders 'Welcome, Alice'. Mismatch.
issues_found.fix: SSR with user via cookies, or render placeholder until mounted

broader_pattern: User-specific content + SSR = either SSR with auth or render placeholder.
what_makes_this_review_senior: User-specific SSR is the canonical hydration trap; placeholder-until-mount pattern.

review_summary: Hook called conditionally. Plus process.env.NODE_ENV may not be available in Vite.

issues_found.title: Rules of Hooks violation
issues_found.explanation: Hooks must run in same order every render. early return + later hook breaks rules.

issues_found.title: Vite uses import.meta.env
issues_found.explanation: process.env may be undefined in Vite. Use import.meta.env.DEV.

issues_found.title: JSON.stringify entire store
issues_found.explanation: Could be huge.

issues_that_arent_issues: Position fixed for debug panel OK.
broader_pattern: Hooks before conditional returns. Env access via build-time replacement.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Rules of Hooks; Vite env vs Node env; tree-shaking via static replacement.
